title: Radical Publishing Networks
subtitle:
Independent media and publishing initiatives focused on revolutionary literature,
                    critical analysis, and building solidarity through radical perspectives.

initiatives.name: Fifth Estate
initiatives.description: A radical anti-authoritarian publishing project active since 1965, coordinating mutual aid and solidarity through critical analysis, revolutionary literature, and independent media. They organize resource sharing and community education while building networks of resistance through anarchist perspectives on politics, culture, and social movements.
